MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS 351 TURK STREET PARTNERSHIP, MARTIN GAEHWILER and MAG MANAGEMENT INC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts supporting request for punitive damages (malice/oppression/ fraud/SFRO 37.9B) as to a corporate entity. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
